Your all-in-one collaborative workspace.
Coda brings teams and tools together for a more organized work day.
Get started for free
Contact sales
A few of the 50,000+ teams collaborating on Coda.
"It’s more powerful than Google Docs and more flexible than Airtable or Notion."
- Fast Company
Compare Coda
4 ways
50,000+ teams
use Coda to supercharge their work days.
Writeups
Coda is familiar like a doc and engaging like an app, so your team can jump in quickly, collaborate effectively, and make decisions that stick.
Explore Zoom’s decision doc
Replaces
Hubs
Teams move quicker together. So give them a place to get on the same page while centralizing everything from strategy to schedules.
Explore Coda's team hub
Replaces
Trackers
Tables talk to each other, edits sync everywhere, views are personalized—and you can ditch the hacky spreadsheets.
Explore Figma’s product roadmap
Replaces
Applications
With Coda, anyone can design a time-saving solution with a formula, button, or automation. And replace niche apps in your tool stack.
Explore Google's LaunchCal
Replaces
Want to see more?
Our Gallery is full of solutions published by teams who use Coda to supercharge their work, create a feeling of organization, and foster collaborative workflows.
Explore the Gallery
Take the busywork out of your work with Coda AI.
The connected work assistant that knows your team—and can take action for you.
Get answers faster with AI chat.
Spark dynamic dialogue with Coda AI to brainstorm, create content, or ask questions.
Create more with AI assistant.
Let Coda AI start from scratch, summarize, or generate tables, so you can share your work—faster.
Save time with AI column.
Turn data into insights, or tedious tasks into auto-generated content with the ability to use AI at scale.
Create workflows across your must-have tools.
Pull Google Calendars into the team wiki, push updates into Slack automatically, embed Figma files into a project brief, create Jira tickets from feedback tables, and more with our 600+ integrations.
Browse
And getting started is easy.
With customizable solutions and templates for every team.

Your Privacy Choices
We use cookies to give you the best experience when using our website. To learn more about our cookie use, see our
Cookie Notice
Your Privacy Choices
Reject All
Accept Cookies
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Data
When you visit our website, we store cookies on your browser to collect information. The information collected might relate to you, your preferences or your device, and is mostly used to make the site work as you expect it to and to provide a more personalized web experience. However, you can choose not to allow certain types of cookies, which may impact your experience of the site and the services we are able to offer. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings according to your preference. You cannot opt-out of our First Party Strictly Necessary Cookies as they are deployed in order to ensure the proper functioning of our website (such as prompting the cookie banner and remembering your settings, to log into your account, to redirect you when you log out, etc.). For more information about the First and Third Party Cookies used please follow this link.
Cookie Notice
Allow All
Manage Consent Preferences
Strictly Necessary Cookies
Always Active
These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
Analytics and Customization Cookies
Analytics and Customization Cookies
Allow cookies on the Coda website that help us analyze traffic and improve your experience.
Share or Sale of Personal Data
Share or Sale of Personal Data
As a California consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale or sharing of your personal information at any time across business platform, services, businesses and devices. You can opt-out of the sale and sharing of your personal information by using this toggle switch. As a Virginia, Utah, Colorado and Connecticut consumer, you have the right to opt-out from the sale of your personal data and the processing of your personal data for targeted advertising. You can opt-out of the sale of your personal data and targeted advertising by using this toggle switch. For more information on your rights as a United States consumer see our privacy notice.
Advertising (Targeting) Cookies
Switch Label
Allow the collection of data and use of cookies on the Coda website to personalize ads on partner websites.
Third-party Publisher Analytics Cookies
Switch Label
Allow third-party publisher cookies on their published docs used to track publisher document activity.

FAQs
What is a "Workspace"?
A workspace is the home for you and your team in Coda. It will store your docs in an organized way, and you can invite Doc Makers and Editors into your workspace to collaborate all in one place. For administrators, this is the place where you'll configure your team's settings and manage your account.
What is a "Doc Maker"?
Doc Makers can create and manage docs, pages, folders, and workspaces.
Specifically — in workspaces, Doc Makers have the power to create new docs and templates and create and manage folders to organize the workspace. Within docs, Doc Makers can administer things like adding pages, changing doc and page titles and icons, adjusting the timezone, configuring doc and page locking etc. Coda AI is also included for Doc Makers.
Editors can edit content and collaborate in existing docs & pages, including adding tables & views, constructing formulas & buttons, adding and configuring Packs & automations, etc.
Learn more
Who do I pay for and why?
Upgrading a free workspace to a paid plan can be done with a single Doc Maker or can include your whole team to start. As you grow into Coda, you can invite additional members to become Editors or Doc Makers in your workspace. Editors and Viewers are always free.
At the end of each billing cycle, you will be billed for the workspace based on how many Doc Makers are in the workspace. Any changes to the number of Doc Makers in the workspace mid-cycle are automatically prorated.
How much does Coda AI cost?
Coda AI is included for Doc Makers, and Editors also receive a free trial. Based on your plan and number of Doc Makers, each workspace receives a set of credits each month, that are pooled across all Doc Makers.
Learn more
What is a credit?
Credits are Coda's way of counting how much AI you use. You could think about credits as fragments of text. 1 credit is approximately 40 characters in English, or 7.5 words. Anytime you use Coda AI, we measure how much content is in the input + the output and convert those into credits. So if you have a huge block of text and ask for a small summary, your number of credits will be based on the large input + small output. If you have a small prompt asking AI to write a long essay, you'll have a small input + large output. And if you have a large input and large output, you'll add those lengths together to get your total credits used for that request.
How can I get more AI credits?
If you have used all of your allotted credits, or would like to access more, you can add more Doc Makers to your workspace, upgrade your plan, or purchase an AI credit add-on. You can purchase 2,000 credits for $2/Doc Maker/Month, 6,000 credits for $6/Doc Maker/month, or unlimited credits for $12/Doc Maker/month (billed monthly).
Learn more
Can I give edit access to people outside of my workspace?
Yes! Whenever you share a doc with someone outside of your workspace, they will be added as a Guest Editor (though you can turn this ability off if you'd like). Guest Editors can edit content in individual docs shared with them, but cannot add and manage pages, or browse the doc's workspace or folder. Guest Editors are free, just like Editors in your workspace.
All Editors and Viewers in a workspace are free! Viewers can open any shared link to a doc and view and comment on it. Just like Guest Editors, Viewers are also guests and cannot see the full workspace or folder.
What happens when I publicly share my doc?
You can always share a doc to anyone with a link through the sharing feature inside the doc.
Learn more
When will I get billed for my workspace?
When you sign up for a new plan, as well as when it renews, you will be billed up front for all the users in your workspace.
Whenever you add a new paid user to your workspace (or upgrade an existing one), we'll prorate them for the remainder of your billing cycle. On the annual plan, you will be charged monthly for these additional membership changes, with prorations applied for the remainder of the billing year. Additionally, you will be charged whenever your bill exceeds $1,000 from adding new members.
Do I get a refund if I remove members from my workspace or cancel my plan?
When you remove members or cancel your plan, we'll apply a prorated credit onto your account you can use for future charges in your workspace.
Do you offer discounts for students, educators, non-profits, or startups?
Yes!
Students and educators: We offer several discounts, depending on your needs.
If you're a student, get started
here
.
If you're an educator, get started
here
.
Non-profits: Qualifying organizations can receive a 50% discount. Get started
here
.
Startups: Eligible startups can get the Team plan free for 6 months for their workspace. Apply
here
.
How does Enterprise pricing work?
You only pay for Doc Makers, even on Enterprise. With increased scalability, security and support, Enterprise plans are a great pick if you're planning to roll out Coda across multiple teams or departments. Coda's pricing scales to fit enterprise teams at every stage and we work with you to find the custom fit for your situation.
Request demo

You can opt-out of the sale of your personal data and targeted advertising by using this toggle switch. For more information on your rights as a United States consumer see our privacy notice.

hits.title: Coda, a “next-generation spreadsheet” – from rows and columns to custom apps
CODA: Rewriting Transformer Blocks as GEMM-Epilogue Programs
Parsing Excel Spreadsheets with Swift's Codable Protocols
Codata in action, or how to connect FP and OOP
Codakido, Lua/SDL programming environment for Kids, with C64-alike editor

analysis.name: Coda
analysis.value_proposition: Coda combines docs, spreadsheets, and custom apps into one AI-powered collaborative workspace, replacing multiple tools with a single flexible platform.
analysis.ideal_customer: Cross-functional knowledge-worker teams (product, marketing, sales, engineering) who want to consolidate docs, trackers, and lightweight internal apps into one tool

features.name: collaborative docs
features.description: Real-time collaborative document editing familiar like a word processor
features.evidence_quote: Coda is familiar like a doc and engaging like an app, so your team can jump in quickly

features.name: unlimited pages
features.description: Unlimited pages and objects within docs; free tier caps at unshared docs only

features.name: connected tables
features.description: Tables that reference and sync data from each other within a doc
features.evidence_quote: Connected tables, charts, kanban boards, and forms

features.name: charts
features.description: Visual chart views built on top of table data
features.evidence_quote: Connected tables, charts, kanban boards, and forms

features.name: kanban boards
features.description: Kanban view for any table, configurable by any column
features.evidence_quote: Connected tables, charts, kanban boards, and forms

features.name: forms
features.description: Publishable forms to collect responses from users outside Coda; custom branding on paid tiers
features.evidence_quote: Publish forms to collect responses from users outside of Coda.

features.name: formulas
features.description: Spreadsheet-style formula language for computations and logic across tables and docs

features.name: automations
features.description: Rule-based automations to trigger actions on schedules or events; unlimited on Team+
features.evidence_quote: Put your repetitive yet important tasks — like sending daily updates — on autopilot.

features.name: buttons
features.description: Clickable buttons embedded in docs that trigger formulas or automations
features.evidence_quote: Word processing, Coda AI, buttons, controls, automations, and more

features.name: controls
features.description: Interactive UI controls (sliders, dropdowns, etc.) embeddable directly in docs
features.evidence_quote: Buttons, pages, sliders, tables, views and other objects in docs.

features.name: ai chat
features.description: Conversational AI interface for brainstorming, Q&A, and content generation within docs
features.evidence_quote: Spark dynamic dialogue with Coda AI to brainstorm, create content, or ask questions.

features.name: ai assistant
features.description: AI that writes from scratch, summarizes content, or generates full tables on demand
features.evidence_quote: Let Coda AI start from scratch, summarize, or generate tables, so you can share your work—faster.

features.name: ai column
features.description: Table column powered by AI that auto-generates content or insights at row-by-row scale
features.evidence_quote: Turn data into insights, or tedious tasks into auto-generated content with the ability to use AI at scale.

features.name: coda brain
features.description: AI platform for surfacing and acting on team knowledge across all docs; private preview
features.evidence_quote: An AI platform that helps teams spend less time hunting for information—and more time putting data to work.

features.name: version history
features.description: Doc version history: 7 days (free), 30 days (Pro), unlimited (Team/Enterprise)

features.name: hidden pages
features.description: Hide specific pages within a doc from viewers or editors

features.name: custom domains
features.description: Publish docs on a user-owned custom domain

features.name: custom icons & branding
features.description: Custom icons and branding applied to docs and workspace UI

features.name: doc locking
features.description: Lock a doc to prevent unintended edits by collaborators

features.name: advanced locking
features.description: Granular locking with enforced dependencies across sections and docs

features.name: enforced dependencies
features.description: Enforce workflow order dependencies between docs or sections

features.name: cross-doc sync
features.description: Sync tables and push edits across multiple docs for a single source of truth
features.evidence_quote: Sync tables and send edits across docs for a single source of truth.

features.name: sync pages
features.description: Sync page content across multiple docs so edits propagate everywhere

features.name: packs
features.description: Integration extensions connecting docs to third-party apps; 600+ available, tiered by plan
features.evidence_quote: Packs connect your doc to the apps you use every day.

features.name: pack studio
features.description: Developer platform for building custom Packs (integrations)

features.name: pack controls
features.description: Admin approval, auditing, and allowlisting of Packs across the org

features.name: real-time collaboration
features.description: Multiple users editing the same doc simultaneously with live presence

features.name: doc sharing
features.description: Share docs with internal workspace members or external users at configurable permission levels

features.name: publishing
features.description: Publish docs publicly as standalone web pages; supports custom domains on Pro+

features.name: publishing stats
features.description: Analytics dashboard for published doc views and engagement

features.name: internal doc analytics
features.description: Usage analytics for internal docs across the workspace

features.name: page analytics
features.description: Per-page view and engagement metrics

features.name: folders
features.description: Organize docs into unlimited folders; per-folder access control on Team+

features.name: folder access management
features.description: Control which users can access specific folders within the workspace

features.name: attachments
features.description: File attachments in docs: 1GB/doc (free), 5GB/doc (Pro), unlimited (Team/Enterprise)

features.name: workspace management
features.description: Admin panel for organizing docs, folders, and managing workspace membership
features.evidence_quote: Organize your team's docs and folders, manage members, and more

features.name: advanced user management
features.description: Enterprise admin controls for user roles, permissions, and lifecycle management

features.name: domain capture
features.description: Automatically add users with a matching email domain to the workspace

features.name: saml sso
features.description: SAML-based single sign-on for enterprise identity providers

features.name: scim provisioning
features.description: Automated user provisioning and deprovisioning via SCIM protocol

features.name: scim group sync
features.description: Share docs and control access using SCIM-synced groups

features.name: advanced access controls
features.description: Granular org-level permission controls beyond standard sharing settings

features.name: advanced sharing rules
features.description: Org-level policies governing how docs can be shared externally

features.name: audit events
features.description: Immutable audit log of user and admin actions for compliance

features.name: soc 2 type 2
features.description: SOC 2 Type II compliance report available to enterprise customers

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA-compliant configuration for healthcare and regulated industries

features.name: legal hold
features.description: Legal hold capability for data retention and litigation requirements

features.name: ediscovery
features.description: eDiscovery search and export for legal and compliance use cases

features.name: maker billing model
features.description: Only Doc Makers (creators) are paid seats; editors and viewers are always free
features.evidence_quote: Instead of charging for everyone, we only charge for the people who create docs and pages.

features.name: import / export
features.description: Import data from external tools and export Coda docs to standard formats
features.evidence_quote: Importing data from other tools, or exporting your Coda doc

features.name: templates gallery
features.description: Curated library of pre-built doc templates published by Coda and community teams
features.evidence_quote: Our Gallery is full of solutions published by teams who use Coda to supercharge their work

features.name: team hubs
features.description: Centralized team-level pages consolidating strategy, schedules, and docs in one place
features.evidence_quote: Give them a place to get on the same page while centralizing everything from strategy to schedules.

features.name: api
features.description: Public REST API for programmatic access to Coda docs, tables, and data

features.name: formula library
features.description: Reference documentation for all supported Coda formula functions

features.name: group trainings
features.description: Live group training sessions for teams on Team and Enterprise plans

features.name: priority support
features.description: Elevated support SLA with direct access for enterprise customers

features.name: dedicated success team
features.description: Assigned customer success manager for enterprise accounts

differentiators: Maker Billing: only doc creators are charged; editors and viewers are always free regardless of team size
All-in-one platform replacing docs, spreadsheets, and custom apps in a single tool
"More powerful than Google Docs and more flexible than Airtable or Notion" — Fast Company
Anyone can build app-like solutions with formulas, buttons, and automations — no code required
Coda Brain: AI platform for cross-doc knowledge retrieval (private preview)

recent_ships.what: Coda Brain — AI platform for team knowledge retrieval, private preview launch
recent_ships.source: Now in private preview: Coda Brain. An AI platform that helps teams spend less time hunting for information

recent_ships.what: HIPAA compliance added to Enterprise plan
Legal hold added to Enterprise plan

praised: "More powerful than Google Docs and more flexible than Airtable or Notion" — Fast Company (cited on landing)
Recognized as capable of replacing multiple tools in the stack (docs + spreadsheets + niche apps)
complaints: Grammarly acquisition of Coda generated notable HN discussion (130↑ 83c) raising questions about product direction and independence

free_tier.limits: unlimited pages for unshared docs only; 1GB attachments/doc; 7-day version history; low automation quota; manual pack refresh; 42 free packs

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Collaborative docs, connected tables, charts, kanban, forms, formulas, automations (low quota), AI trial, 42 packs

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited pages/objects, 30-day history, 5GB attachments, hidden pages, custom domains, branding, AI credits, 52 packs

tiers.name: Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited automations/history/attachments, doc locking, cross-doc sync, folder access mgmt, group trainings, 78 packs

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: SAML SSO, SCIM, audit events, advanced controls, SOC2 T2, HIPAA, legal hold, eDiscovery, dedicated success, 92 packs

pricing.notes: Maker Billing: only Doc Makers (doc/page creators) are paid seats; Editors and Viewers are always free. 15% discount for annual billing. Bulk pricing available via sales contact. Pack tier determines data refresh frequency (manual → daily → hourly) and number of available integrations.

Japanese man sentenced to prison for posting spoilers
'Coda vs. Goodyear': Indefiniteness destroys trade secrets
